decision-tree.root-question: Has the eval-set been confirmed hash-disjoint from train + val?

branch.question: Do ≥2 metrics show CI-clear improvement over base?

branch.conclusion: gate_decision = pass. Hand off to deployment methodology.
gate_decision = fail. Iterate fine-tune or rollback to base.
gate_decision = hold. Collect more eval examples; re-run.
Fix eval set first. No eval without held-out.

example.p: ft model on 300 held-out → accuracy 88% (base 68%, CI ±4%), format 99% (base 84%, CI ±2%) → both pass → gate=pass.
